name: avatar-builder
description: Turn a rough product idea into a personified, research-grounded customer avatar — then tell you what to do about it. Interviews you, then outputs a named persona with demographics, motivations (jobs-to-be-done), fears/desires, the acute problem, current alternatives, their language, a prioritized channel map, anti-fit, a one-line thesis, the riskiest assumption to validate, and 3 concrete strategic moves (message, channel, offer) tailored to that persona.
